steps.title: Identify the time marker
steps.content: ”Nearly 150 years ago” clearly shows the action happened in the past.

steps.title: Choose the verb form
steps.content: ”Completed” is simple past tense—the form that correctly expresses when Van Gogh created the drawing. The other three choices use present, future, or continuous tenses that don't fit a finished action from the past. That matches choice C — C is correct.
